global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with bold text and shapes.
global.main_message: Promoting an exclusive offer for PulsePlay.

elements.label: Green background
elements.description: A solid green background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Circular shape
elements.description: A large, light green circular shape positioned in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Square shape
elements.description: A large, light green square shape positioned in the center of the ad, overlapping with the circular shape.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circle located towards the right side of the ad.

elements.label: Small rectangle
elements.description: A small rectangle located towards the right side of the ad, below the small circle.

elements.label: Small rectangle
elements.description: A small rectangle located towards the bottom left corner of the ad.

elements.label: Small rectangle
elements.description: A small rectangle located towards the right side of the ad, overlapping with the small circle.

elements.label: Small rectangle
elements.description: A small rectangle located towards the right side of the ad, above the small rectangle.

elements.label: Small rectangle
elements.description: A small rectangle located towards the right side of the ad, below the small rectangle.

elements.label: Main offer text
elements.description: Bold, black text stating 'Exclusive tonight Start free today' prominently displayed in the center.

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The logo 'PulsePlay' displayed in bold, black text at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A button with the text 'Learn more' in white on a black background, located at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small tag labeled 'UGC' in white text on a black background, positioned at the top left corner.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and modern, exclusive offer, PulsePlay.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main offer text is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
